title: Acctim 74662 Nardo 20cm Radio Controlled White Wall Clock
features: Automatically sets the correct time using the UK and Ireland MSF radio signal, ensuring accurate and reliable timekeeping without manual adjustment, ideal as a radio controlled wall clock for everyday home or office use.

Tuned to the UK atomic clock transmitter, this radio controlled clock automatically adjusts for summer and winter time changes, delivering hassle free accuracy once the signal is received and the clock is fully set.
Clear analogue dial with bold markers makes the time easy to read from across the room, making this wall clock a practical choice for kitchens, living rooms, offices or shared household spaces.
Quality glass lens protects the clock face from dust and marks, helping maintain long lasting clarity while enhancing the overall finish and durability of the clock for daily use.
Compact 20cm wall clock size suits a wide range of rooms without dominating the wall, offering a neat and modern look that blends easily with both contemporary and traditional interiors.
description: Bring precise, effortless timekeeping into your home with the Acctim Nardo Radio Controlled Wall Clock, a stylish and reliable 20cm wall clock designed for modern UK living. This radio controlled wall clock UK model automatically sets itself using the UK and Ireland MSF radio signal, ensuring your clock always displays the correct atomic time without manual adjustment. As a true self setting clock, it removes the hassle of resetting after power changes or daylight saving time, making it an ideal automatic wall clock for busy households. Tuned to the UK atomic clock transmitter, this radio controlled clock adjusts seamlessly between summer and winter time, delivering precision you can rely on day after day. The high-quality radio controlled clock mechanism provides accurate timekeeping, making it suitable as a radio controlled wall clock for bedrooms, offices, or shared spaces. Whether you need a dependable home clock, a kitchen clock radio controlled, or a neat small radio controlled wall clock, the Nardo offers dependable performance. The clean analogue design features a clear dial with bold hour markers, allowing easy reading from across the room. Protected by a durable glass lens, the clock face stays clear and free from dust, adding long-lasting quality to this Acctim wall clock. Its compact size makes it a versatile choice as a wall clock kitchen, bathroom wall clock, or for wall clocks living room, blending effortlessly with both contemporary and traditional interiors. The neutral finish complements a wide range of décor, from modern minimal to classic styles, alongside other Acctim clocks. Perfect as an atomic wall clock, radio wall clock, or everyday clock for the home, this Acctim radio controlled wall clock 20cm delivers trusted British design and accuracy. Whether used as a kitchen clock, small wall clock, or reliable radio controlled wall clock, the Acctim Nardo is built for clarity, precision, and long-term use—an essential addition to any room that values accurate timekeeping.
